assessment_objectives.objective: the time period within which to install security-relevant software updates after the release of the updates is defined.
automated patch management tools are employed to facilitate flaw remediation to components.
software updates related to flaw remediation are tested for effectiveness before installation.
software updates related to flaw remediation are tested for potential side effects before installation.
firmware updates related to flaw remediation are tested for effectiveness before installation.
firmware updates related to flaw remediation are tested for potential side effects before installation.
security-relevant software updates are installed within an organization-defined time period of the release of the updates.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: within thirty (30) days of release of updates

assessment_objectives.objective: security-relevant firmware updates are installed within an organization-defined time period of the release of the updates.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: within thirty (30) days of release of updates

assessment_objectives.objective: flaw remediation is incorporated into the organizational configuration management process.
the system components requiring automated patch management tools to facilitate flaw remediation are defined.
the time period within which to install security-relevant firmware updates after the release of the updates is defined.
system vulnerabilities are remediated within <A.03.11.02.ODP[03]: response times>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: thirty (30) days from date of discovery for high-risk vulnerabilities (including both critical and high); 90 days from date of discovery for moderate-risk vulnerabilities; and 180 days from date of discovery for low-risk vulnerabilities

assessment_objectives.objective: security-relevant software updates are installed within <A.03.14.01.ODP[01]: time period> of the release of the updates.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: thirty (30) days for high-risk flaws (including both critical and high), 90 days for moderate-risk flaws, and 180 days for low-risk flaws

assessment_objectives.objective: security-relevant firmware updates are installed within <A.03.14.01.ODP[02]: time period> of the release of the updates.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: thirty (30) days for high-risk flaws (including both critical and high), 90 days for moderate-risk flaws, and 180 days for low-risk flaws
